name: Verify Admin can remove Reader from project
description:
Invite member1 to organization with User role.
Invite member1 to project with Reader role.
Verify that:
    - Admin can remove Reader from project
descriptionHtml:
Invite member1 to organization with User role.
Invite member1 to project with Reader role.
Verify that:
- Admin can remove Reader from project

testStage.description:
Invite member1 to organization with User role.
Invite member1 to project with Reader role.
Verify that:
    - Admin can remove Reader from project
